name: Abbott, William Benjamin Jr.
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: He came to us after having served as the editor of the "Tulane Hullabaloo," and he has maintained the "rep" that such an honor brings. He is one of the best writers on the campus, and should make a great success of journalism. His likeable personality makes him particularly fitted for it.
text: He came to us after having served as the editor of the "Tulane Hullabaloo," and he has maintained the "rep" that such an honor brings. He is one of the best writers on the campus, and should make a great success of journalism. His likeable personality makes him particularly fitted for it.

name: Abernathy, Jack
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Jack is to finish in three years, thus demonstrating more than the average amount of intelligence. During his stay he has been a very popular man, and we feel that the future holds nothing but good for him.
text: Jack is to finish in three years, thus demonstrating more than the average amount of intelligence. During his stay he has been a very popular man, and we feel that the future holds nothing but good for him.

name: Ainsworth, Isabel
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: A girl possessed of the languorous ease of the Southland; but with a surprising degree of ability beneath that quiet, for she is a university Senior. Any of her many friends can give a good account of Isabel. She has made a splendid impression during her four years here.
text: A girl possessed of the languorous ease of the Southland; but with a surprising degree of ability beneath that quiet, for she is a university Senior. Any of her many friends can give a good account of Isabel. She has made a splendid impression during her four years here.

name: Alexander, Hilda Julia
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Hilda likes everybody and everybody likes Hilda. Her whole-hearted college spirit, pep and energy, combined with the qualities of a good student, number her among the best of Ole Miss.
text: Hilda likes everybody and everybody likes Hilda. Her whole-hearted college spirit, pep and energy, combined with the qualities of a good student, number her among the best of Ole Miss.

name: Alexander, Ruth Dent
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Ruth, if we were asked to describe you, we should say pliant, friendly, capable, smiling, joyful, resourceful, strong, and stop for lack of breath. We are not sorry when our co-eds are judged by you.
text: Ruth, if we were asked to describe you, we should say pliant, friendly, capable, smiling, joyful, resourceful, strong, and stop for lack of breath. We are not sorry when our co-eds are judged by you.

name: Clark, Marie T.
major: BACHELOR OF SCIENCE
description: Marie is a conscientious student, a real sport at play and a true friend. What more could you wish a girl to be?
text: Marie is a conscientious student, a real sport at play and a true friend. What more could you wish a girl to be?

name: Clayton, Samuel Monte, Jr.
major: BACHELOR OF SCIENCE IN COMMERCE
description: He must be very attractive, judging from his success with the girls, and we wouldn't dispute the evidence (he gave us four bits for that!). Really a mighty likeable fellow and one appreciated by his friends. We wish him the best of luck in love and out.
text: He must be very attractive, judging from his success with the girls, and we wouldn't dispute the evidence (he gave us four bits for that!). Really a mighty likeable fellow and one appreciated by his friends. We wish him the best of luck in love and out.

name: Combs, William W.
major: BACHELOR OF ARTS
description: Combs is a quiet fellow, but he has a very engaging personality, which is making him well liked in spite of the fact that he has been with us only one year. He has made a real success this year in the Glee Club which makes his popularity assured.
text: Combs is a quiet fellow, but he has a very engaging personality, which is making him well liked in spite of the fact that he has been with us only one year. He has made a real success this year in the Glee Club which makes his popularity assured.

name: Doney, Amy Kathleen
major: BACHELOR OF ARTS
description: Judged by scholarship Kathleen is an "A" girl; judged by sincerity of purpose and honesty of friendship she is also an "A" girl.
text: Judged by scholarship Kathleen is an "A" girl; judged by sincerity of purpose and honesty of friendship she is also an "A" girl.

name: Elmore, Mary Laverte
major: BACHELOR OF SCIENCE, College of Liberal Arts
description: This curly-haired Senior seems to have correctly observed the Golden Mean, for she is equally remembered as a very creditable student and an active "socialist." No sincerer compliment can be paid you than to say we're glad you are named Mary, remembering the beauty of that name.
text: This curly-haired Senior seems to have correctly observed the Golden Mean, for she is equally remembered as a very creditable student and an active "socialist." No sincerer compliment can be paid you than to say we're glad you are named Mary, remembering the beauty of that name.

name: Fant, Richard Beckett
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
clubs: Y. M. C. A. Promotion Committee
description: Always friendly, always helpful, always decisive, and at all times interested in others—that's Beckett. The "Ole Miss" of '24 represents but one of his many accomplishments as a student at Ole Miss, from all of which there radiate his congeniality, optimism and his dogged determination.
text: Always friendly, always helpful, always decisive, and at all times interested in others—that's Beckett. The "Ole Miss" of '24 represents but one of his many accomplishments as a student at Ole Miss, from all of which there radiate his congeniality, optimism and his dogged determination.

name: Finch, Jesse D.
major: Bachelor of Science, College of Liberal Arts
description: The one who made a mistake and tried to get a group in Calculus and almost missed it. He is, however, diligent and persistent and is certain to succeed. He is to be admired in every way.
text: The one who made a mistake and tried to get a group in Calculus and almost missed it. He is, however, diligent and persistent and is certain to succeed. He is to be admired in every way.

name: Fite, Robbie Lucille
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: When the end of our college life is reached, and we remember the friends that are made there, Roberta Pugna shall be one. And you are not so misnamed, after all, for you are ever ready to fight for the glory of your Alma Mater.
text: When the end of our college life is reached, and we remember the friends that are made there, Roberta Pugna shall be one. And you are not so misnamed, after all, for you are ever ready to fight for the glory of your Alma Mater.

name: Gladden, Sanford Charles
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Old Socrates is our standby. Without him the scenery would be incomplete. A conscientious student, a fast friend and a very likeable nature combining to make him well known and popular.
text: Old Socrates is our standby. Without him the scenery would be incomplete. A conscientious student, a fast friend and a very likeable nature combining to make him well known and popular.

name: Godwin, Mabel
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Mabel's friendly manner and happy disposition have won for her many friends among both the professors and students.
text: Mabel's friendly manner and happy disposition have won for her many friends among both the professors and students.

name: Lewis, Franklin Hall
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Big and happy-go-lucky Lewis has dug a deep niche for himself in the heart of Ole Miss. A good sport, a sincere friend and a loyal supporter of the university.
text: Big and happy-go-lucky Lewis has dug a deep niche for himself in the heart of Ole Miss. A good sport, a sincere friend and a loyal supporter of the university.

name: James, Daniel Hardy
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: James is truly said to be one of the brightest men on the campus. He attended Southwestern in '21, '22, but returned back to his state institution last year to receive his degree this year. We are expecting great things of him.
text: James is truly said to be one of the brightest men on the campus. He attended Southwestern in '21, '22, but returned back to his state institution last year to receive his degree this year. We are expecting great things of him.

name: John, Floyd Hudson
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Whenever we hear the name of "John F" on the campus we at once think of that popular, ever-smiling person whose good nature radiates, even to the remotest corner of our little sphere. A good sport, a booster of athletics and a "Hello" for everybody has won him a host of sincere friends who wish him the "very best" of luck in his chosen profession—medicine.
text: Whenever we hear the name of "John F" on the campus we at once think of that popular, ever-smiling person whose good nature radiates, even to the remotest corner of our little sphere. A good sport, a booster of athletics and a "Hello" for everybody has won him a host of sincere friends who wish him the "very best" of luck in his chosen profession—medicine.

name: Harriet, Jemima Jackson
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Harriet, if only your potentialities be developed and realized, much glory will be added to our college annals. Paragons of virtue are rare, but there is in you a full measure of everything that adds to make life beautiful.
text: Harriet, if only your potentialities be developed and realized, much glory will be added to our college annals. Paragons of virtue are rare, but there is in you a full measure of everything that adds to make life beautiful.

name: Johnson, Oney Shaw
major: Bachelor of Science
description: Shaw is almost entirely occupied with romance and so does not have much time for we students. But nevertheless he is looked up to as somewhat of an authority on some questions. His dance was one of the biggest successes of the season, for instance.
text: Shaw is almost entirely occupied with romance and so does not have much time for we students. But nevertheless he is looked up to as somewhat of an authority on some questions. His dance was one of the biggest successes of the season, for instance.

name: Jones, James Harding
major: BACHELOR OF ARTS, College of Liberal Arts
description: In Jimmie Jones we find one of the best all-around fellows and as true a son to Ole Miss as any that ever came to this institution. He has played his part in both the Latin, Greek and Education Clubs, and especially should be complimented on the success of the Greek Club this year. Jimmie, our best wishes and heartiest good will go with you.
text: In Jimmie Jones we find one of the best all-around fellows and as true a son to Ole Miss as any that ever came to this institution. He has played his part in both the Latin, Greek and Education Clubs, and especially should be complimented on the success of the Greek Club this year. Jimmie, our best wishes and heartiest good will go with you.

name: Jones, Gratz Jr.
major: BACHELOR OF SCIENCE, College of Liberal Arts
description: Gratz, by rights, does not belong to be graduating this year. He should take another year at least in order to more thoroughly master his work. He deserves much commendation for the way he stuck by the baseball scrubs until at last he won the coveted "M."
text: Gratz, by rights, does not belong to be graduating this year. He should take another year at least in order to more thoroughly master his work. He deserves much commendation for the way he stuck by the baseball scrubs until at last he won the coveted "M."

name: Keys, Robert Taylor
major: BACHELOR OF SCIENCE, College of Liberal Arts
description: His depth of mind is of astronomical dimensions. He is always prepared and has never been known to miss a question. Notwithstanding, however, he is a capable man, and is greatly admired by all who know him.
text: His depth of mind is of astronomical dimensions. He is always prepared and has never been known to miss a question. Notwithstanding, however, he is a capable man, and is greatly admired by all who know him.

name: Lamar, Lavergne Lucien
major: BACHELOR OF SCIENCE, College of Liberal Arts
description: Lavergne has drunk deep of the spring of knowledge. We wish her all the success that she so richly deserves.
text: Lavergne has drunk deep of the spring of knowledge. We wish her all the success that she so richly deserves.

name: Lipscomb, Mattie Louise
major: BACHELOR OF ARTS, College of Liberal Arts
description: Witty, lovable and true, Mattie Louise is one who can work when it is time for work and play as hard as she has worked.
text: Witty, lovable and true, Mattie Louise is one who can work when it is time for work and play as hard as she has worked.

name: Jacob, W. Lindsey
major: Bachelor of Science, College of Liberal Arts
description: Quiet, but a very valuable man on the campus. One of firmness, determination and diligence. He has allied himself with the good forces of the campus and is well liked by everyone. The best of the world's fortunes is our invocation for him.
text: Quiet, but a very valuable man on the campus. One of firmness, determination and diligence. He has allied himself with the good forces of the campus and is well liked by everyone. The best of the world's fortunes is our invocation for him.

name: Thomas, O. Mabry
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: After spending a year in each of the above schools Mabry decided it best to come back to his state institution to get his degree. A good student and especially in geology.
text: After spending a year in each of the above schools Mabry decided it best to come back to his state institution to get his degree. A good student and especially in geology.

name: Olive, Elizabeth Mauldin
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Both boys and girls like Olive. She is a continual source of humor, laughter and good will. She will be greatly missed next year.
text: Both boys and girls like Olive. She is a continual source of humor, laughter and good will. She will be greatly missed next year.

name: Thomas, Jefferson Parks
major: Bachelor of Science, College of Liberal Arts
clubs: Y. M. C. A. Promotion Committee, 4
description: T. J. made good in the literary societies last year, but his medical studies have prevented his participation this year. Though getting a literary degree this year, he is studying for the medical profession and in it he is sure to succeed.
text: T. J. made good in the literary societies last year, but his medical studies have prevented his participation this year. Though getting a literary degree this year, he is studying for the medical profession and in it he is sure to succeed.

name: William, E. Phillips
major: Bachelor of Science, College of Liberal Arts
description: There is not a better man on the campus than Bill Phillips. He isn't so noisy, but he is never left out in a rush and he is generally known as a jolly good fellow and a true friend.
text: There is not a better man on the campus than Bill Phillips. He isn't so noisy, but he is never left out in a rush and he is generally known as a jolly good fellow and a true friend.

name: Meyer, Algernon Pigford
motto: "Fellows, they're your men as well as mine. TALK IT UP."
major: Bachelor of Science, College of Liberal Arts
description: Fatty is one of the most popular and best all-round fellows we have on the campus. He has proven his loyalty to this institution in many ways. We are for you, and you are sure to make a great success in the cruel world.
text:
"Fellows, they're your men as well as mine. TALK IT UP."
Fatty is one of the most popular and best all-round fellows we have on the campus. He has proven his loyalty to this institution in many ways. We are for you, and you are sure to make a great success in the cruel world.

name: Powell, Montie Mai
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: There are those who pass our way having an influence that is helpful and good to remember. Such a one was Montie, always ready to lift those who passed her with a smile.
text: There are those who pass our way having an influence that is helpful and good to remember. Such a one was Montie, always ready to lift those who passed her with a smile.

name: Ratcliff, Colley C.
major: Bachelor of Science, College of Liberal Arts
description: Colley wears an M of former years when he did his bit to help Ole Miss. He returned this year after several years' absence, and assumed at once his old place in the hearts of his friends. He will be missed when the next year rolls around.
text: Colley wears an M of former years when he did his bit to help Ole Miss. He returned this year after several years' absence, and assumed at once his old place in the hearts of his friends. He will be missed when the next year rolls around.

name: Ratcliff, Leon Dekalb
major: Bachelor of Science, College of Liberal Arts
description: The president of the Senior Class is no less a dignitary than this gentleman himself. His ability and popularity need no further proof than that, for he is one of our best.
text: The president of the Senior Class is no less a dignitary than this gentleman himself. His ability and popularity need no further proof than that, for he is one of our best.

name: Ray, Hugh Edwin Jr.
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: A fine fellow from Corinth. He has a wonderful way with the ladies, but really is a bit bashful about working it. A very popular boy and one who is widely known and liked.
text: A fine fellow from Corinth. He has a wonderful way with the ladies, but really is a bit bashful about working it. A very popular boy and one who is widely known and liked.

name: Russell, Mary Irene
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Although Irene belonged to some other college before she came to us, we feel as if she has always been here. She is a very interesting person to be with and we hope that she will make as good a record in life as she has at the university.
text: Although Irene belonged to some other college before she came to us, we feel as if she has always been here. She is a very interesting person to be with and we hope that she will make as good a record in life as she has at the university.

name: Sartain, Austin Rethel
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
clubs: Y. M. C. A. Promotion Committee
description: Frank, forward and open-minded is Austin. A faithful student and a good college sport, ever ready for fun and frolic, and also capable of holding many honors and responsibilities where only ability will serve.
text: Frank, forward and open-minded is Austin. A faithful student and a good college sport, ever ready for fun and frolic, and also capable of holding many honors and responsibilities where only ability will serve.

name: Short, William Wayne
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Wayne is one of the jolliest fellows we have, and with his personality and scientific ability, a success is assured. He goes out this year with '24's best wishes.
text: Wayne is one of the jolliest fellows we have, and with his personality and scientific ability, a success is assured. He goes out this year with '24's best wishes.

name: Simmons, Sicily
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: We are sorry that Sicily did not come to Ole Miss sooner. She is always bubbling with fun and pep. Her smile would capture most any "ed" on the campus.
text: We are sorry that Sicily did not come to Ole Miss sooner. She is always bubbling with fun and pep. Her smile would capture most any "ed" on the campus.

name: Strahan, Eva Eugenia
major: Bachelor of Science, College of Liberal Arts
description: Eva is a fine girl. She is honest and sincere in all she undertakes. She possesses all those qualities of womanhood which will make her successful in the professional world.
text: Eva is a fine girl. She is honest and sincere in all she undertakes. She possesses all those qualities of womanhood which will make her successful in the professional world.

name: Claywell, Gilliand Turley
major: BACHELOR OF SCIENCE, College of Liberal Arts
description: Men like Deacon Turley are few and far between. He is, upon occasions, the most comical or the wittiest or again the most intellectual man in the student body. His place will be hard to fill when he is gone.
text: Men like Deacon Turley are few and far between. He is, upon occasions, the most comical or the wittiest or again the most intellectual man in the student body. His place will be hard to fill when he is gone.

name: Delmartyn, Vardaman
major: BACHELOR OF ARTS, College of Liberal Arts
description: When one speaks of a real college girl, Del. comes to mind. She excels in her studies and is a star on our basketball team. Delmartyn is always ready to do anything for the good of the school.
text: When one speaks of a real college girl, Del. comes to mind. She excels in her studies and is a star on our basketball team. Delmartyn is always ready to do anything for the good of the school.

name: Cena, Walker
major: BACHELOR OF ARTS, College of Liberal Arts
description: Beneath Cena's reserve there is a wealth of fun and frolic. She is a good student—just ask her about her grades.
text: Beneath Cena's reserve there is a wealth of fun and frolic. She is a good student—just ask her about her grades.

name: Emmabel, Woodward
major: BACHELOR OF ARTS, College of Liberal Arts
description: Emmabel is one of the jolliest girls on the campus. In her work she is rated as one of the best students at the university. It is too bad that she does not reside at the "Coop."
text: Emmabel is one of the jolliest girls on the campus. In her work she is rated as one of the best students at the university. It is too bad that she does not reside at the "Coop."

name: Willie, Palmer York
major: BACHELOR OF SCIENCE, College of Liberal Arts
description: Commonly known as "Mr. York." He is a good student and a very likeable man. He is one of the few who are really taking advantage of a college education to learn all that it holds. He is to be congratulated on his record.
text: Commonly known as "Mr. York." He is a good student and a very likeable man. He is one of the few who are really taking advantage of a college education to learn all that it holds. He is to be congratulated on his record.

name: Trim, William Robert
major: Bachelor of Science in Commerce, School of Commerce
description: Trim is our best bet for a future operator of an American Monte Carlo. Though a little fellow, he is always prominent in whatever crowd he may be in. And he is universally liked.
text: Trim is our best bet for a future operator of an American Monte Carlo. Though a little fellow, he is always prominent in whatever crowd he may be in. And he is universally liked.

name: Turfitt, Myron
major: Bachelor of Science in Commerce, School of Commerce
clubs: Vice-President Senior B. S. C. Class, 4
Y. M. C. A. Assistant in B. S. C. Department
description: Myron has had a hard time with English, though at business he is a bird. He is one of the instructors in the Commercial School and has made good at it. His associates acclaim him a good friend and a pleasant companion.
text: Myron has had a hard time with English, though at business he is a bird. He is one of the instructors in the Commercial School and has made good at it. His associates acclaim him a good friend and a pleasant companion.

name: Hall, Francis Everett
major: BACHELOR OF ENGINEERING, School of Engineering
description: If looks were all, he wouldn't get far, but his attractive old self shines right on through that face of his, and one cannot help being proud of his friendship. His dancing feet would bring in more revenue than his engineering if he should choose to go on the stage.
text: If looks were all, he wouldn't get far, but his attractive old self shines right on through that face of his, and one cannot help being proud of his friendship. His dancing feet would bring in more revenue than his engineering if he should choose to go on the stage.

name: Herring, Harrell B.
major: BACHELOR OF ENGINEERING, School of Engineering
description: H. B. is one year behind his class since he stayed out for a year of practical experience, but he returned this year with his studiousness unchanged, and his good nature actually improved. His success is already assured, but we hate to lose him from the school.
text: H. B. is one year behind his class since he stayed out for a year of practical experience, but he returned this year with his studiousness unchanged, and his good nature actually improved. His success is already assured, but we hate to lose him from the school.

name: Lawson, James B.
major: BACHELOR OF ENGINEERING, School of Engineering
description: Jimmie came here from A. & M. three years ago and since then has been one of the leading lights of the engineering school. His success is attested by the fact that he was chosen this year as president of his class.
text: Jimmie came here from A. & M. three years ago and since then has been one of the leading lights of the engineering school. His success is attested by the fact that he was chosen this year as president of his class.

name: Smith, Richard Myrl
major: BACHELOR OF ENGINEERING, School of Engineering
description: Myrl Smith has a future before him, but no one can guess its nature. A citizen of Oxford he has, therefore, been at considerable disadvantage, though he has succeeded to such an extent as to be one of the most promising of his class.
text: Myrl Smith has a future before him, but no one can guess its nature. A citizen of Oxford he has, therefore, been at considerable disadvantage, though he has succeeded to such an extent as to be one of the most promising of his class.

name: Worley, Hugh Jr.
major: Bachelor of Engineering, School of Engineering
description: Hugh is also a resident of Oxford and he has always upheld nobly the high standards of his position. The profession will surely be the better for his entrance, and from that time on there will be no more impossibilities.
text:
"The best is yet to come."
Hugh is also a resident of Oxford and he has always upheld nobly the high standards of his position. The profession will surely be the better for his entrance, and from that time on there will be no more impossibilities.

name: Ainsworth, Temple
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: Another hard working medical student who doesn't let this dry subject interfere with his duties to his fellow-students. He is not only bright and industrious, but a peach of an associate as well. If he lives and doesn't fall in love his success is certain.
text:
"The best is yet to come."
Another hard working medical student who doesn't let this dry subject interfere with his duties to his fellow-students. He is not only bright and industrious, but a peach of an associate as well. If he lives and doesn't fall in love his success is certain.

name: Barkley, James Wesley
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: The brother of the other one and equally as popular, though we can predict no such astounding discoveries for him. He is a very diligent student and will no doubt make a success of his profession.
text:
"The best is yet to come."
The brother of the other one and equally as popular, though we can predict no such astounding discoveries for him. He is a very diligent student and will no doubt make a success of his profession.

name: Barkley, Thomas Jefferson
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: Behold the incarnation of Chaucer—minus the poetry. A more popular and good-natured man was never beheld. An indispensable supporter of the School of Medicine, a basketball man of renown and one of the most successful students we have known. He will be missed when he has gone away.
text:
"The best is yet to come."
Behold the incarnation of Chaucer—minus the poetry. A more popular and good-natured man was never beheld. An indispensable supporter of the School of Medicine, a basketball man of renown and one of the most successful students we have known. He will be missed when he has gone away.

name: Cunningham, Robert B.
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: Like the Cunningham of anatomy fame, "R. B." knows his stuff. While as yet he has not tried to improve upon the English Cunningham, we would not be surprised if he did essay the task.
text:
"The best is yet to come."
Like the Cunningham of anatomy fame, "R. B." knows his stuff. While as yet he has not tried to improve upon the English Cunningham, we would not be surprised if he did essay the task.

name: Crawford, John Albert
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: A quiet, good-natured man, and a good track man. He has a personality which makes him universally liked and he will leave many good friends behind him. We can only wish the best of the world's luck for him with the certainty that success is his.
text: A quiet, good-natured man, and a good track man. He has a personality which makes him universally liked and he will leave many good friends behind him. We can only wish the best of the world's luck for him with the certainty that success is his.

name: Dickerson, J. Benton
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: McComb has sent many and various individuals to the university, but none better than Dick. He has become a familiar figure around the campus and he will most assuredly be missed by those who return next year.
text: McComb has sent many and various individuals to the university, but none better than Dick. He has become a familiar figure around the campus and he will most assuredly be missed by those who return next year.

name: Dougherty, Mark Stovall, Jr.
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: The school will be forever indebted to Mark as one of the most patriotic men who ever attended the university. His list of honors will indicate his versatility. 'Tis a pity that a man of such broadness should confine himself to one narrow profession, though he is sure to succeed in that.
text: The school will be forever indebted to Mark as one of the most patriotic men who ever attended the university. His list of honors will indicate his versatility. 'Tis a pity that a man of such broadness should confine himself to one narrow profession, though he is sure to succeed in that.

name: Goodwin, Francis Chappelle
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: Frank is known among the students as one of the jolliest and finest men the university ever welcomed. He is a true, sincere pal, a good student and has caused many a feminine heart to flutter. And if Frank should fail to dim the lights of the Mayo brothers, he will disappoint his classmates of '24.
text: Frank is known among the students as one of the jolliest and finest men the university ever welcomed. He is a true, sincere pal, a good student and has caused many a feminine heart to flutter. And if Frank should fail to dim the lights of the Mayo brothers, he will disappoint his classmates of '24.

name: Haney, Taswell Paul
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: Haney's love for the ladies was only excelled by his love for the medical profession. His studies always came first, but he did not neglect campus life.
text: Haney's love for the ladies was only excelled by his love for the medical profession. His studies always came first, but he did not neglect campus life.

name: Dewitt, Hamrick
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
clubs: Student Assistant in Bacteriology and Pathology, 4
description: As bacteriology assistant Hamrick made good. He seems to live for his chosen profession alone. His perseverance cannot but bring him fame in the medical profession.
text: As bacteriology assistant Hamrick made good. He seems to live for his chosen profession alone. His perseverance cannot but bring him fame in the medical profession.

name: Hughes, William Lauch
major: M.D., School of Medicine
description: It is men like Lauch that cause us to stop and wonder whether our opinions concerning the products of A. & M. are correct after all. The loss of A. & M. is our gain. He is one of the most likeable men on the campus.
text: It is men like Lauch that cause us to stop and wonder whether our opinions concerning the products of A. & M. are correct after all. The loss of A. & M. is our gain. He is one of the most likeable men on the campus.

name: Huffman, Marion Maitland
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: One of the best all-around men on the campus. He is universally liked, though his studies do not keep him very much at home. He is taking his work seriously and will surely make an ideal surgeon.
text: One of the best all-around men on the campus. He is universally liked, though his studies do not keep him very much at home. He is taking his work seriously and will surely make an ideal surgeon.

name: Johnson, Johnnie Rufus
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: J. Rufus is well liked by everyone. His humor is keen, his sociability is well marked, yet in the classroom his grades are of the best. Rufus is one whose memory his classmates will long cherish.
text: J. Rufus is well liked by everyone. His humor is keen, his sociability is well marked, yet in the classroom his grades are of the best. Rufus is one whose memory his classmates will long cherish.

name: Markette, John Ralph, Jr.
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: "Skinny" was one to take part in every part of campus activity. If his popularity at Ricks and Ward Halls was great it was excelled by the applause when he took part in the Glee Club performances. "Skinny" Markette is a man that will "GET THERE."
text: "Skinny" was one to take part in every part of campus activity. If his popularity at Ricks and Ward Halls was great it was excelled by the applause when he took part in the Glee Club performances. "Skinny" Markette is a man that will "GET THERE."

name: Pope, Virginia Borum
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
clubs: Member A. S. B. Executive Council
description: All the co-eds are proud to claim Virginia as their student government president. Her justice, sympathy and mentality inspire the love and admiration of every student.
text: All the co-eds are proud to claim Virginia as their student government president. Her justice, sympathy and mentality inspire the love and admiration of every student.

name: Shackelford, John W. Jr.
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
clubs: Y. M. C. A. Promotion Committee
description: All who knew him acclaimed him without peer. We have no fears but that "Doctor" Shackelford will inspire the confidence of whatever community he may select to practice in.
text: All who knew him acclaimed him without peer. We have no fears but that "Doctor" Shackelford will inspire the confidence of whatever community he may select to practice in.

name: Smith, Prentiss Edward
major: M.D., School of Medicine
description: Everybody both knew and liked P. E. Sociable, studious, he was the kind of man the students liked to elect to office because they knew the work would be done.
text: Everybody both knew and liked P. E. Sociable, studious, he was the kind of man the students liked to elect to office because they knew the work would be done.

name: Stroud, Carliss Malone
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
clubs: Y. M. C. A. Promotion Committee
description: As a Freshman he was the freshest of them all. When in love he fell deeper than anyone else. In the classroom he stood at the top. Whatever he did, Malone did with all that was in him and that was a good deal.
text: As a Freshman he was the freshest of them all. When in love he fell deeper than anyone else. In the classroom he stood at the top. Whatever he did, Malone did with all that was in him and that was a good deal.

name: Texada, Blanchard Hickman
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: Coming from Tulane to study medicine, he has been here only two years, and studies have kept him from making himself too prominent in that time, but he is highly esteemed by his associates as a student and as a good fellow.
text: Coming from Tulane to study medicine, he has been here only two years, and studies have kept him from making himself too prominent in that time, but he is highly esteemed by his associates as a student and as a good fellow.

name: Lawrence, C. Corban
major: BACHELOR OF ARTS, BACHELOR OF LAWS, School of Law
description: It is unnecessary to write the eulogies of Lawrence. The above facts speak for themselves. He is a man of beautiful character, uplifting influence and a most engaging personality. His place will be hard to fill when he is gone.
text: It is unnecessary to write the eulogies of Lawrence. The above facts speak for themselves. He is a man of beautiful character, uplifting influence and a most engaging personality. His place will be hard to fill when he is gone.

name: Cox, William Harold
major: BACHELOR OF SCIENCE, BACHELOR OF LAWS, School of Law
clubs: Secretary and Treasurer Senior Law Class, 4
description: Harold is one of the quiet type and always makes friends wherever he goes. It might be well to mention in passing that he is not adverse to the company of the weaker sex. Harold's place in college life will be hard to fill, as he is sincere in his work, true to his friends and loyal to his school.
text: Harold is one of the quiet type and always makes friends wherever he goes. It might be well to mention in passing that he is not adverse to the company of the weaker sex. Harold's place in college life will be hard to fill, as he is sincere in his work, true to his friends and loyal to his school.

name: Drake, Carl Francis
major: BACHELOR OF LAWS, School of Law
description: Drake should make a good judge if the manner in which he maintains order in the law library is a criterion. He is a good student and an exceptionally hard worker, and the legal profession should be proud to welcome him.
text: Drake should make a good judge if the manner in which he maintains order in the law library is a criterion. He is a good student and an exceptionally hard worker, and the legal profession should be proud to welcome him.

name: Evans, Charles Carrolton
major: BACHELOR OF LAWS, School of Law
description: As for Charles an accurate description may be given in these few words: "He is a good fellow and a true friend." When he takes up the practice of law we can depend upon him to make good.
text: As for Charles an accurate description may be given in these few words: "He is a good fellow and a true friend." When he takes up the practice of law we can depend upon him to make good.

name: Ford, James Ira
major: BACHELOR OF LAWS, School of Law
description: Ira comes fresh from where the cooling breezes do faintly blow and he shows it. Always in a good humor and laughing over something, he is a good antidote to the day's work. Some day he will come back to us a famous statesman.
text: Ira comes fresh from where the cooling breezes do faintly blow and he shows it. Always in a good humor and laughing over something, he is a good antidote to the day's work. Some day he will come back to us a famous statesman.

name: Grantham, Levi
major: BACHELOR OF LAWS, School of Law
description: There are different grades of success. Some men make a living and nothing more. Others live lives worthy the respect of their fellow men by not only making an honest living, but also giving out something to mankind. In the second class we place Levi.
text: There are different grades of success. Some men make a living and nothing more. Others live lives worthy the respect of their fellow men by not only making an honest living, but also giving out something to mankind. In the second class we place Levi.

name: Herring, George Bryan
major: BACHELOR OF LAWS, School of Law
description: As president of the student body, "G. B." has unswervingly worked for the best interest of Ole Miss, without regard to criticism from either the faculty or student body. Few men have exercised as wide an influence upon the opinions and actions of Ole Miss men and none have used their influence more unselfishly or wisely.
text: As president of the student body, "G. B." has unswervingly worked for the best interest of Ole Miss, without regard to criticism from either the faculty or student body. Few men have exercised as wide an influence upon the opinions and actions of Ole Miss men and none have used their influence more unselfishly or wisely.

name: Hathorn, John Cooper
major: BACHELOR OF LAWS, School of Law, B.S., '21
description: Whether it was catching a pop fly or a Taylor medal, "Happy" got that which he went after. If it was gettable he counted it as his. We have the utmost confidence that he will win his cases with the same ease.
text: Whether it was catching a pop fly or a Taylor medal, "Happy" got that which he went after. If it was gettable he counted it as his. We have the utmost confidence that he will win his cases with the same ease.

name: Jiggetts, Louis M.
major: Bachelor of Laws, School of Law
description: Returning to us after an absence of three years in Oxford, England, where his name became known to periodicals, both at home and abroad, he has achieved a record which would make the most vain of us jealous. He has indeed come up to our expectations, and his last year in the university has been marked by great influence and popularity.
text: Returning to us after an absence of three years in Oxford, England, where his name became known to periodicals, both at home and abroad, he has achieved a record which would make the most vain of us jealous. He has indeed come up to our expectations, and his last year in the university has been marked by great influence and popularity.

name: Savage, John W.
major: BACHELOR OF ARTS, BACHELOR OF LAWS, School of Law
description: Although a lawyer by choice, John is a genius when it comes to putting any job "over" and performing the duties of a business man. We don't know just yet where he intends to hang the proverbial "shingle," but the bar has gained a good member, and wherever he goes he is sure to make good.
text: Although a lawyer by choice, John is a genius when it comes to putting any job "over" and performing the duties of a business man. We don't know just yet where he intends to hang the proverbial "shingle," but the bar has gained a good member, and wherever he goes he is sure to make good.

name: Scott, Walter A., Jr.
major: BACHELOR OF LAWS, School of Law
description: Whatever pathway Walter may choose, if history repeats itself, will unquestionably lead to success, for his past has been a consummation of loyalty, industry, ability and tact. We predict a brilliant success for him before the bar.
text: Whatever pathway Walter may choose, if history repeats itself, will unquestionably lead to success, for his past has been a consummation of loyalty, industry, ability and tact. We predict a brilliant success for him before the bar.

name: Stovall, John Askew
major: BACHELOR OF LAWS, School of Law
description: John A. is the busiest little man on the campus, taking a very active interest in all branches of college activities. On the football team he was known as the little guard with the fighting spirit and the persistent determination to give his best.
text: John A. is the busiest little man on the campus, taking a very active interest in all branches of college activities. On the football team he was known as the little guard with the fighting spirit and the persistent determination to give his best.

name: Stump, Delbert R.
major: BACHELOR OF LAWS, School of Law
description: "Doc" has the reputation of being the best lawyer on the campus, and in order to satisfy his own curiosity as to how much law he knew, he took the bar examination last summer and passed it. Because of his friendly disposition, we fear a good man will be ruined by his entry into politics.
text: "Doc" has the reputation of being the best lawyer on the campus, and in order to satisfy his own curiosity as to how much law he knew, he took the bar examination last summer and passed it. Because of his friendly disposition, we fear a good man will be ruined by his entry into politics.

name: Armistead, Charles Bonner
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: The smiling youth from the gulf coast, came to us last year after spending a year at A. & M. With his good nature, friendly disposition and likable personality, he is one of the best fellows we have on the campus.
text: The smiling youth from the gulf coast, came to us last year after spending a year at A. & M. With his good nature, friendly disposition and likable personality, he is one of the best fellows we have on the campus.

name: Bilbo, J. V.
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: The nephew of our distinguished ex-governor, bids fair to become as successful a pharmacist as his uncle is a statesman and editor. He received a bad start by entering Mississippi College, but soon realized his mistake and came to the University.
text: The nephew of our distinguished ex-governor, bids fair to become as successful a pharmacist as his uncle is a statesman and editor. He received a bad start by entering Mississippi College, but soon realized his mistake and came to the University.

name: Breland, Roland Q., Jr.
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: Due to Breland's ability to manage pros as well as the Ole Miss eleven, he is graduating this year, having made a fine record in the School of Pharmacy. He has been in evidence ever since, especially on the varsity quintet.
text: Due to Breland's ability to manage pros as well as the Ole Miss eleven, he is graduating this year, having made a fine record in the School of Pharmacy. He has been in evidence ever since, especially on the varsity quintet.

name: Clayton, William F.
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: Clayton is a very valuable man to the School of Pharmacy. He is always the same anywhere you meet him, and he can be depended on to help in any good cause.
text: Clayton is a very valuable man to the School of Pharmacy. He is always the same anywhere you meet him, and he can be depended on to help in any good cause.

name: Corbett, Kathleen
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: Kathleen is one of the dearest, sweetest girls the university ever welcomed. Her sweet personality and her winning smile has won her quite a number of good friends. We send her out with 1921's best wishes.
text: Kathleen is one of the dearest, sweetest girls the university ever welcomed. Her sweet personality and her winning smile has won her quite a number of good friends. We send her out with 1921's best wishes.

name: Cox, E. Dillard
major: GRADUATE IN PHARMACY, School of Pharmacy
description: Ed started swatting the ball in Booneville and now promises to be a valuable addition to our baseball squad. A good man is hard to down, so he is to come up for a "dip" in June.
text: Ed started swatting the ball in Booneville and now promises to be a valuable addition to our baseball squad. A good man is hard to down, so he is to come up for a "dip" in June.

name: Daniel, Homan Marvin
major: GRADUATE IN PHARMACY, School of Pharmacy
description: One of the nicest men we ever knew and one of the most popular. He will make a great success of his profession and will probably make a million out of a patent medicine, even as E. W. Grove did.
text: One of the nicest men we ever knew and one of the most popular. He will make a great success of his profession and will probably make a million out of a patent medicine, even as E. W. Grove did.

name: Easterling, Mrs. H. M.
major: GRADUATE IN PHARMACY, School of Pharmacy
description: South Mississippi is fortunate to have the privilege to claim Mrs. Easterling. She is one of the leaders in the School of Pharmacy, and her work here is only the beginning of a great success.
text: South Mississippi is fortunate to have the privilege to claim Mrs. Easterling. She is one of the leaders in the School of Pharmacy, and her work here is only the beginning of a great success.

name: Givens, Sheldon J.
major: GRADUATE IN PHARMACY, School of Pharmacy
description: Sheep is one of the Old Royal Order of the Water Slingers of Center, and will go down in history as one of the bravest of the brave. He is one of the popular men of the profession and will some day make the proud proprietor of a small town drug store, as his ability is unlimited in all fields.
text: Sheep is one of the Old Royal Order of the Water Slingers of Center, and will go down in history as one of the bravest of the brave. He is one of the popular men of the profession and will some day make the proud proprietor of a small town drug store, as his ability is unlimited in all fields.

name: Herring, Joe Willie
major: Ph.G., B.S., School of Pharmacy
description: A man of sterling character and admirable personality. One whom we all respect and are glad to call a friend, for there is no truer friend than he. Joe is mighty well known on the campus, and we will be sorry to see him go. With his industry and stickability, he is sure of success in any field.
text: A man of sterling character and admirable personality. One whom we all respect and are glad to call a friend, for there is no truer friend than he. Joe is mighty well known on the campus, and we will be sorry to see him go. With his industry and stickability, he is sure of success in any field.

name: Hinton, Clarence O.
major: Ph.G., B.S., School of Pharmacy
description: It is very seldom there comes to Ole Miss a fellow as unassuming, studious and quiet as Clarence. Behind this meditative mind many of his classmates have found a real friend. With these fine qualities he is sure to make good wherever he decides to settle.
text: It is very seldom there comes to Ole Miss a fellow as unassuming, studious and quiet as Clarence. Behind this meditative mind many of his classmates have found a real friend. With these fine qualities he is sure to make good wherever he decides to settle.

name: Holder, George Ernest
major: GRADUATE IN PHARMACY, School of Pharmacy
description: The marvel of the age—how does he pass without ever studying? However, his books would take too much of his valuable time away from us, and so we are very well pleased as things are. We almost hope he doesn't pass so he will stay another year.
text: The marvel of the age—how does he pass without ever studying? However, his books would take too much of his valuable time away from us, and so we are very well pleased as things are. We almost hope he doesn't pass so he will stay another year.

name: Locke, James Charles
major: GRADUATE IN PHARMACY, School of Pharmacy
description: This noble descendant of the ancient alchemists is one of the quieter members of the H₂S inhalers. He served Uncle Sam on the seas during the war, but has now decided to alleviate pain instead of administering punishment.
text: This noble descendant of the ancient alchemists is one of the quieter members of the H₂S inhalers. He served Uncle Sam on the seas during the war, but has now decided to alleviate pain instead of administering punishment.

name: Loden, Fernando Woodie
major: GRADUATE IN PHARMACY, School of Pharmacy
description: Along with good work in the classroom Loden makes good in basketball and dashes off 100 yards with amazing rapidity. At any rate, his record shows that he has "put out" and we expect him to have a great success on the "outside."
text: Along with good work in the classroom Loden makes good in basketball and dashes off 100 yards with amazing rapidity. At any rate, his record shows that he has "put out" and we expect him to have a great success on the "outside."

name: Mangum, Frank Foster
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: Frank lives thirteen "stills" from Magee and that is one block off Main street. He is a good pharmacist and a practical man, but he has apparently never become educated, for he still longs to return to the wilds of Sullivan Hollow.
text: Frank lives thirteen "stills" from Magee and that is one block off Main street. He is a good pharmacist and a practical man, but he has apparently never become educated, for he still longs to return to the wilds of Sullivan Hollow.

name: McElroy, John B.
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: Another from the great metropolis of Baldwin. We hope it sends more like him, for his type is the one we like best. Quiet and unassuming, but a forceful character nevertheless.
text: Another from the great metropolis of Baldwin. We hope it sends more like him, for his type is the one we like best. Quiet and unassuming, but a forceful character nevertheless.

name: Parkes, Roger
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: Ladies and Gentlemen (ladies especially): We present to you the only untamed and incorrigible "lady-killer" of the Pharmacy Class of '24. Aside from being a good pharmacist, his highest ambition is to make some little girl 'way down in Winston a good husband.
text: Ladies and Gentlemen (ladies especially): We present to you the only untamed and incorrigible "lady-killer" of the Pharmacy Class of '24. Aside from being a good pharmacist, his highest ambition is to make some little girl 'way down in Winston a good husband.

name: Pigott, Lawrence A.
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: Lawrence is one of the finest boys we have on the campus. Quiet, yet a very influential man. He leaves us this year with the best wishes of the future from the Class of '24.
text: Lawrence is one of the finest boys we have on the campus. Quiet, yet a very influential man. He leaves us this year with the best wishes of the future from the Class of '24.

name: Pigott, Louis I.
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: Louis is rather a modest, unassuming young gentleman and his two years here were spent in earnest labor. He is kind and energetic and can always be depended on.
text: Louis is rather a modest, unassuming young gentleman and his two years here were spent in earnest labor. He is kind and energetic and can always be depended on.

name: Rape, John Woodson
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: South Mississippi has sent us another son of whom she may feel proud. Little Woodson hails from Moss Point, the thriving metropolis of Jackson county. Woodson has been a fighting scrub on the basketball squad for several years. He has exhibited qualities of determination and fight which are sure to be recognized in later life.
text: South Mississippi has sent us another son of whom she may feel proud. Little Woodson hails from Moss Point, the thriving metropolis of Jackson county. Woodson has been a fighting scrub on the basketball squad for several years. He has exhibited qualities of determination and fight which are sure to be recognized in later life.

name: Rouse, H. K., Jr.
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: A smooth-faced boy in appearance, but a man in manner. He is a fine fellow and is very popular with his classmates. As a pharmacist he is a good soda-jerker and will no doubt make a great success at it.
text: A smooth-faced boy in appearance, but a man in manner. He is a fine fellow and is very popular with his classmates. As a pharmacist he is a good soda-jerker and will no doubt make a great success at it.

name: Smith, Benjamin Charles
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: Chosen by his classmates as most fitted to represent them as president of the association, his campus standing is apparent. Ben is a quiet boy who attends to his own business and gets results. He has many friends on the campus.
text: Chosen by his classmates as most fitted to represent them as president of the association, his campus standing is apparent. Ben is a quiet boy who attends to his own business and gets results. He has many friends on the campus.

name: Smith, Gibson Spivey
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: Kilmichael has been and is represented by various and sundry Flowers and Smiths, all of which are very high in our respect. Gibson is a mighty popular boy and endeared himself to the members of Center Gordon by his achievements on the athletic field in the Inter-Mural series.
text: Kilmichael has been and is represented by various and sundry Flowers and Smiths, all of which are very high in our respect. Gibson is a mighty popular boy and endeared himself to the members of Center Gordon by his achievements on the athletic field in the Inter-Mural series.

name: Smith, Charles Franklin
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: Full of grit, humor and confidence—that's Smith—and one of the best all-around fellows we have on the campus. If you are fortunate enough to win his friendship there is nothing too small or too great for him to do for you.
text: Full of grit, humor and confidence—that's Smith—and one of the best all-around fellows we have on the campus. If you are fortunate enough to win his friendship there is nothing too small or too great for him to do for you.

name: Tucker, Leslie Campbell
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, School of Pharmacy
description: "Les" is a man of great attainments, both in his profession and without. He is, however, entirely too good-looking for a pharmacist, though he will no doubt make his store a rendezvous for Ladies' Aid Societies, and, therefore, a great success. We wish him the best of luck in the world.
text: "Les" is a man of great attainments, both in his profession and without. He is, however, entirely too good-looking for a pharmacist, though he will no doubt make his store a rendezvous for Ladies' Aid Societies, and, therefore, a great success. We wish him the best of luck in the world.
